message:
refactor(pages): simplify recovery secret encoding to use BASE64_URL_SAFE_NO_PAD directly

Replace the RecoverySecret::from_bytes() → .encoded() chain with a direct
BASE64_URL_SAFE_NO_PAD.encode() call. The previous approach added unnecessary
entropy validation that could reject valid recovery secrets, and the base64url
encoding result is identical. Re-adds the base64::prelude import that was
removed in the prior commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
